name: BIOFORCE NANOSCIENCES HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: BioForce Nanosciences Holdings, Inc. (BFNH) is a nutritional supplements company that markets and sells vitamins, minerals, powders, and beverages under the BioForce Eclipse brand. Its flagship product is a private-label multivitamin and mineral supplement powder produced by Body Align, LLC in Virginia. The company targets athletes, elderly individuals, and health-conscious consumers, selling through online channels, social media, and B2B sales. It reported no customers in fiscal years 2022 and 2023.
